identities.name: Dimensional Homogeneity Traps
identities.logic: Predicting the dimensions of obscure constants like Stefan's constant or Coefficient of Viscosity.

identities.name: Graph Interpretation-Slope/Area
identities.logic: Interpreting work done from P-V diagrams or Acceleration from V-t graphs. Focusing on 'Cyclic' vs 'Non-cyclic' processes.

identities.name: Semiconductor - Logic Gate Fusion
identities.logic: NAND/NOR as universal gates. Using de Morgan's theorems to simplify complex gate combinations.

identities.name: Optics - Focal Length in Medium
identities.logic: Calculating lens power shift when immersed in a medium of different refractive index. Lens Maker's Formula application.

identities.name: Rayleigh Criterion - Resolution
identities.logic: Limit of resolution for Microscope vs Telescope. Focusing on 'wavelength dependency'.

traps.name: Significant Figures
traps.description: Calculation where the answer must follow rules of significant figures for addition vs multiplication.

traps.name: Mass of Electron neglect
traps.description: Common trap in Photoelectric effect or Atomic physics where 'mass' is mentioned but not needed, or vice-versa.
